quiz.question:
Black puts the rook on g2. 

How many legal moves does the White king have?

feedback.text: Exactly! The king cannot move! The rook on g2 is defended, so it cannot be taken, and all the other squares on the board are controlled by Black.

distractors.text: One legal move. The game is not over.

feedback.text: The game is over. This is a draw because it's White's turn and White does not have legal moves!

distractors.text: Zero. This is checkmate. White lost.

feedback.text: The king on h1 is not checkmated because nothing attacks it. It is simply restricted without legal moves, this means it's stalemate.
